ddls:
CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the material */,
  "specific_heat" REAL /* Specific heat capacity of the material */,
  "thermal_conductivity" REAL /* Thermal conductivity of the material */,
  "material_composition" TEXT /* Composition of the material */,
  "morphology" TEXT /* Physical form of the material (e.g., powder, solid) */,
  "thermal_expansion_coefficient" REAL /* Thermal expansion coefficient of the material */,
  "phase_change_temperature" REAL /* Phase change temperature of the material */,
  "cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost of the material per unit */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the material used */,
  "geometry" TEXT /* Geometry of the system */,
  "boundary_conditions" TEXT /* Boundary conditions of the system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the configuration */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the configuration */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was last updated */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the configuration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the configuration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ml_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "training_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the training data */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was trained */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "training_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used during training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role (e.g., researcher, engineer, administrator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Specific heat capacity of the material
Physical form of the material (e.g., powder, solid)
Thermal expansion coefficient of the material
Phase change temperature of the material
Cost of the material per unit
Date when the configuration was created
Date when the configuration was last updated
User who last updated the configuration
Status of the configuration (e.g., active, inactive)
Type of the model (e.g., regression, classification)
Date when the model was trained
Last time the user logged in
